summary: Comprehensive testing of SEO/GEO/AEO enhancements for JMLPH landing page. All major features verified: 13 SEO meta tags (including citation and Dublin Core), 6 JSON-LD schemas (Organization, Periodical, PublicationIssue with 8 ScholarlyArticles, WebSite with SearchAction, BreadcrumbList, FAQPage), semantic HTML (main element, WebPage itemScope), and FAQ accordion section with 8 Q&As. All existing features working correctly.
passed_tests: SEO: Meta description with ISSN 2788-791X and detailed content
SEO: Extended keywords meta tag with all expected terms
SEO: robots tag includes max-snippet:-1 and max-image-preview:large directives
SEO: citation_journal_title meta tag present
SEO: citation_issn meta tag present (2788-791X)
SEO: citation_publisher meta tag present (ARETION Publishing Group)
SEO: DC.title Dublin Core meta tag present
SEO: DC.publisher Dublin Core meta tag present
SEO: DC.type Dublin Core meta tag present (journal)
SEO: DC.language Dublin Core meta tag present (en)
SEO: DC.identifier Dublin Core meta tag present (ISSN: 2788-791X)
SEO: og:image:alt Open Graph meta tag present
SEO: twitter:image:alt Twitter Card meta tag present
Structured Data: Organization schema with @id, logo, address, contactPoint, sameAs
Structured Data: Periodical schema with audience, publicationFrequency, dateCreated
Structured Data: PublicationIssue schema with 8 ScholarlyArticle entries in hasPart
Structured Data: WebSite schema with SearchAction
Structured Data: BreadcrumbList schema with 3 items
Structured Data: FAQPage schema with 8 question-answer pairs
GEO: <main> semantic HTML element present in rendered page
GEO: WebPage itemScope on root div
AEO: FAQ section visible with data-testid='faq-section'
AEO: 8 FAQ items displayed with data-testid='faq-item-{idx}'
AEO: FAQ accordion expands/collapses correctly with animation
AEO: FAQ section has FAQPage itemType microdata
AEO: FAQ items have Question itemType microdata
AEO: FAQ toggle buttons have data-testid attributes
Existing: Header section present
Existing: Hero section present
Existing: Metrics section present
Existing: About section present
Existing: OJS Portal section present
Existing: Current Issue section with 8 articles
Existing: Submission section present
Existing: Newsletter section present
Existing: Contact section present (phone removed)
Existing: Footer present
Existing: Policy modals working (Privacy Notice tested)
critical_code_review_comments: Note: Main agent mentioned 7 JSON-LD schemas but there are 6 distinct schema blocks in index.html. This is correct implementation - Organization, Periodical, PublicationIssue, WebSite, BreadcrumbList, FAQPage.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All SEO/GEO/AEO features verified. 6 JSON-LD schemas present (Organization with @id/logo/address/contactPoint/sameAs, Periodical with audience/publicationFrequency/dateCreated, PublicationIssue with 8 ScholarlyArticles, WebSite with SearchAction, BreadcrumbList with 3 items, FAQPage with 8 Q&As). Citation meta tags (citation_journal_title, citation_issn, citation_publisher) and Dublin Core meta tags (DC.title, DC.publisher, DC.type, DC.language, DC.identifier) all present. Enhanced OG/Twitter tags with image:alt. Semantic HTML verified: <main> element wrapping content, WebPage itemScope on root div. FAQ section at #faq with 8 collapsible questions, accordion animation working, microdata attributes (itemScope, itemProp, itemType) present. Phone number removed from contact section. All existing features (header, hero, metrics, about, current issue with 8 articles, submission, newsletter, contact, footer, policy modals) working correctly.
